steps.title: Find the majority example
steps.content: The sentence needs an example showing that women constituted the majority of farmers cultivating a specific crop in some regions. The graph supports that women made up most farmers cultivating non-root vegetables in both north and south Ondo.

steps.title: Exclude weaker data claims
steps.content: Choice A is false because south Ondo's cereal farmers were not mostly women. Choice B compares two crops among women instead of showing women were a majority. Choice D discusses similar cereal proportions rather than female majorities in a crop category. The answer is C.
